Election.title: BV2230 — FairVote-vs-STAR check: French 2017 coordinated burial — Macron squeezed out
Election.description: The burial FairVote's white paper describes: every non-Macron faction scores Macron 0 and inflates the rival wings to 4 (even ideological enemies) to keep him out of the runoff. Same honest first choices as BV2229. It works: Macron collapses (130) and STAR elects Melenchon — FairVote's claim, conceded. But it needs a coordinated conspiracy, honest STAR elects Macron, and RCV-IRV on these ballots elects Le Pen (worse). Backs method_comparisons/fairvote_star_whitepaper.

races.title: FairVote-vs-STAR check: French 2017 coordinated burial — Macron squeezed out
